title: lobelia assurgens subsp. santa-clarae
intro: Lobelia assurgens subsp. santa-clarae, also known as Lobelia, is a flowering plant species within the Campanulaceae family, native to the high-altitude grasslands of South America. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Lobelia include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and chronic coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve circulation. In herbal preparations, Lobelia is often combined with other herbs and used in teas, tinctures, or capsules to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory conditions.
